viewsWelcome.contents:
No documents found in the workspace.

Create a file to get started:
[$(new-file) New Markdown](command:docspace.newMarkdown)
[$(new-file) New Diagram](command:docspace.newMermaid)
[$(new-file) New Canvas](command:docspace.newExcalidraw)

[$(question) View getting started guide](command:docspace.showWelcome)
walkthrough.title: Getting Started with Docspace
walkthrough.description: Organize your project's docs, diagrams and canvas in minutes.
walkthrough.step.sidebar.title: Your docs in one place
walkthrough.step.sidebar.description:
Docspace organizes your files into three categories: **Docs** (`.md`), **Diagrams** (`.mmd`) and **Canvas** (`.excalidraw`).

Create your first file — it appears in the sidebar immediately:

[$(new-file) New Markdown](command:docspace.newMarkdown)
[$(new-file) New Diagram](command:docspace.newMermaid)
[$(new-file) New Canvas](command:docspace.newExcalidraw)
walkthrough.step.sidebar.altText: Docspace sidebar showing Docs, Diagrams and Canvas categories with files
walkthrough.step.preview.title: Markdown and Mermaid Preview
walkthrough.step.preview.description:
Click a `.md` or `.mmd` file in the sidebar to open a live preview alongside it.

Embeds work directly in Markdown:
- `![[diagram.mmd]]` renders the diagram inline
- `![[canvas.excalidraw]]` renders the canvas as SVG

[$(open-preview) Open Preview](command:docspace.openPreview)
walkthrough.step.preview.altText: Split-view preview showing Markdown on the left and rendered content on the right
walkthrough.step.graph.title: Visual project map
walkthrough.step.graph.description:
The **Project Graph** scans your code and displays file dependencies interactively.

Three visualization modes:
- **Dependencies** — import network (force-layout)
- **Flow** — swimlanes by architectural role
- **Impact** — click a file and see what would be affected

[$(type-hierarchy) Open Project Graph](command:docspace.openProjectGraph)
walkthrough.step.graph.altText: Dependency graph with nodes colored by folder and import edges
walkthrough.step.generate.title: Automatic documentation
walkthrough.step.generate.description:
Click the **📖** icon in the Docspace toolbar to automatically generate a `docGerada/` folder with:

- `index.md` — overview + diff vs. previous run
- `estrutura.md` — files grouped by role
- `dependencias.md` — imports per file
- `acoplamento.md` — coupling ranking
- `fluxos.md` — paths from entry points

[$(book) Generate documentation now](command:docspace.regenerateDoc)
walkthrough.step.generate.altText: docGerada folder with generated documentation files and index.md preview
